who: logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles daily
offer: For logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles daily, manual compliance reporting causes late submissions leading to regulatory penalties. We automate daily vehicle route compliance reporting instead of manual reporting processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual compliance reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics fleet managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics fleet managers with demo video
Community forums where logistics fleet managers share tools
try_it: Let users try daily compliance report generation and route tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
